snippet.title: OUR INTIMATE WEDDING | Jessy Mendiola
snippet.description:
LUIS MANZANO & JESSY MENDIOLA INTIMATE WEDDING

Hopefully, after watching the video, youвАЩll have huge smiles on your faces and only feel love because with everything thatвАЩs been happening in the world, thatвАЩs all we want, to share the love and spread some joy to everyone. вЭ§пЄП

To the whole team, we are grateful for each and everyone of you. Thank you for making our wedding day extra special. вЭ§пЄП

#JessGotLucky
#LuisAndJessyWedding
#OurIntimateWedding

SPECIAL THANKS TO OUR WEDDING TEAM:

Videography: Bob Nicolas and team
Phototography: Caliber King and team (Pat DyвАЩs team) 
Venue styling: Gideon Hermosa and team 

Jessy Mendiola 

Glam Team:
Makeup: Kusie Ho
Hair: Anton Papa
Stylist: Patty Yap

Sponsors:
Wedding dress: Patricia Santos
Shoes: Jefferson Si
Nails: ExtraOrdinail
Eyelash Extensions: New Lounge


Luis Manzano: 

Glam Team:
Grooming: Peps Selvestre
Stylist: Rex Atienza/ Jay Sarmiento
Suit by: Paulo Lazaro 

Wedding planner and coordination:  
вАЬTHEвАЭ Joanne Angeles, we LOVE you. Thank you for organizing everything. 
Wedding bands and jewelry: 
Manila Diamond Studio
Intimate dinner sponsored by Lyka and The Farm (special mention to Gibby, Ms. Jenny, Apple and Mr. Preet Singh)
Wedding cake: Celestially Baked 
Special thanks to Ranvel Rufino for helping us out with the venue.
To my sister Meggy, thank you for being by my side the whole time. I love you. 
And of course to Mayor Eric Africa for accommodating us despite his busy schedule.

Please do send me your comments after watching the video and don't forget to subscribe!  вЭ§пЄПвЭ§пЄПвЭ§пЄП

Welcome & enjoy! 

Live life.
Love life.

Love,
Senorita Jessy рЯМЇрЯТЛ

snippet.title: Ў≥Ў®Ў® ЎІЎЃЎ™ўБЎІЎ° ЎІўЕ Ў≤ўКЎІЎѓ!! (ЎѓЎєўИЎІЎ™ўГўЕрЯШ∞)
snippet.description:
Ў≠ўВўКўВЎ© ЎІЎЃЎ™ўБЎІЎ° ЎІўЕ Ў≤ўКЎІЎѓ!! (ЎѓЎєўИЎІЎ™ўГўЕрЯШ∞)
вЩ•вЩ•  ўКЎІ Ў±Ў® ўКўГўИўЖ ЎІўДўБўКЎѓўКўИ ЎєЎђЎ®ўГўЕ ўИўЕЎ™ўЖЎ≥ўИЎі ЎІЎ≠ўДўК ўДЎІўКўГ ўИЎІЎ≠ўДўК ЎІЎіЎ™Ў±ЎІўГ ўИЎ™ўБЎєўКўД ЎђЎ±Ў≥ ўЕўЖ ЎІЎ≠ўДўК ЎІЎЃўИЎІЎ™ ўБўК ЎІўДўГўИўЖ ўИЎіўГЎ±ЎІўЛ ўДўИЎђўИЎѓўГўЕ ўБўК Ў≠ўКЎІЎ™ўЖЎІ ўКЎІ ЎІЎ≠ўДўК ЎђўЕўЗўИЎ± ўИЎІЎЃўИЎІЎ™  вЩ•вЩ•
вЩ•вЩ•  ЎІЎЃўИЎІЎ™ ЎІўЕ Ў∞ўКЎІЎѓ ўИўЕЎ≠ўЕЎѓ ўИЎ≠Ў≥ўЖ ўИЎ≠ўЕЎѓўК ўИўИўБЎІЎ° ўИўЕЎ≠ўЕўИЎѓ ўИЎ≥Ў≠Ў±  вЩ•вЩ•
ўКЎєўЕўДўИЎІ ўДЎІўКўГ ўДўДўБўКЎѓўКўИ ўИўКЎіЎ™Ў±ўГўИЎІ ўБўК ЎІўДўВўЖЎІЎ© ЎєЎіЎІўЖ ўКўИЎµўДўЗўЕ ўГўД ЎђЎѓўКЎѓ ўКЎІ ЎІЎђЎѓЎє ЎІЎЃўИЎІЎ™ ўБўК ЎІўДўГўИўИўИўИўИўИўИўИўИўИўИўЖ
#ЎІЎґЎЇЎЈ_ўДЎІўКўГ
#ўКўИўЕўКЎІЎ™_ЎІўЕ_Ў∞ўКЎІЎѓ

вЩ•вЩ•  ўКЎІ Ў±Ў® ўКўГўИўЖ ЎІўДўБўКЎѓўКўИ ЎєЎђЎ®ўГўЕ ўИўЕЎ™ўЖЎ≥ўИЎі ЎІЎ≠ўДўК ўДЎІўКўГ ўИЎІЎ≠ўДўК ЎІЎіЎ™Ў±ЎІўГ ўИЎ™ўБЎєўКўД ЎђЎ±Ў≥ ўЕўЖ ЎІЎ≠ўДўК ЎІЎЃўИЎІЎ™ ўБўК ЎІўДўГўИўЖ ўИЎіўГЎ±ЎІўЛ ўДўИЎђўИЎѓўГўЕ ўБўК Ў≠ўКЎІЎ™ўЖЎІ ўКЎІ ЎІЎ≠ўДўК ЎђўЕўЗўИЎ± ўИЎІЎЃўИЎІЎ™  вЩ•вЩ•
вЩ•вЩ•  ЎІЎЃўИЎІЎ™ ЎІўЕ Ў∞ўКЎІЎѓ ўИўЕЎ≠ўЕЎѓ ўИЎ≠Ў≥ўЖ ўИЎ≠ўЕЎѓўК ўИўИўБЎІЎ° ўИўЕЎ≠ўЕўИЎѓ ўИЎ≥Ў≠Ў±  вЩ•вЩ•
ўКЎєўЕўДўИЎІ ўДЎІўКўГ ўДўДўБўКЎѓўКўИ ўИўКЎіЎ™Ў±ўГўИЎІ ўБўК ЎІўДўВўЖЎІЎ© ЎєЎіЎІўЖ ўКўИЎµўДўЗўЕ ўГўД ЎђЎѓўКЎѓ ўКЎІ ЎІЎђЎѓЎє ЎІЎЃўИЎІЎ™ ўБўК ЎІўДўГўИўИўИўИўИўИўИўИўИўИўИўЖ

snippet.title: ЎІўДЎ£ўЕўКЎ± ЎІўДЎ£Ў±ЎѓўЖўК Ў≠ўЕЎ≤Ў© Ў®ўЖ ЎІўДЎ≠Ў≥ўКўЖ ўКўВўИўД ўБўК Ў™Ў≥ЎђўКўД ўЕЎµўИЎ± Ў•ўЖўЗ ўВўКЎѓ ЎІўДЎ•ўВЎІўЕЎ© ЎІўДЎђЎ®Ў±ўКЎ© ўБўК ўЕўЖЎ≤ўДўЗ
snippet.description:
ўГЎіўБ ЎІўДЎ£ўЕўКЎ± ЎІўДЎ£Ў±ЎѓўЖўК Ў≠ўЕЎ≤Ў© Ў®ўЖ ЎІўДЎ≠Ў≥ўКўЖ Ў£ўЖўЗ ўВўКЎѓ ЎІўДЎ•ўВЎІўЕЎ© ЎІўДЎђЎ®Ў±ўКЎ© ўБўК ўЕўЖЎ≤ўДўЗ ўИЎ™ўЕ ЎІЎєЎ™ўВЎІўД Ў≠Ў±Ў≥ўЗ ЎІўДЎЃЎІЎµЎМ ўИЎ≥ЎЈ Ў™ўИўВўКўБ ЎІўДЎ≥ўДЎЈЎІЎ™ ЎІўДЎ£Ў±ЎѓўЖўКЎ© ЎіЎЃЎµўКЎІЎ™ Ў®ўКўЖўЗЎІ Ў±Ў¶ўКЎ≥ ЎІўДЎѓўКўИЎІўЖ ЎІўДўЕўДўГўК ЎІўДЎ£Ў≥Ў®ўВ Ў®ЎІЎ≥ўЕ Ў•Ў®Ў±ЎІўЗўКўЕ ЎєўИЎґ ЎІўДўДўЗ ўИЎҐЎЃЎ±ўИўЖ ўДЎ£Ў≥Ў®ЎІЎ® Ў£ўЕўЖўКЎ© ўДўЕ Ў™ўГЎіўБ Ў™ўБЎІЎµўКўДўЗЎІ Ў≠Ў™ўЙ ЎІўДЎҐўЖ ўИўВЎІўД ЎІўДЎ£ўЕўКЎ± Ў≠ўЕЎ≤Ў© Ў®ўЖ ЎІўДЎ≠Ў≥ўКўЖ ўБўК Ў™Ў≥ЎђўКўД ўЕЎµўИЎ± "Ў£Ў≥Ў™ЎЇЎ±Ў® Ў£ўЖ ўКЎ§ЎѓўК ЎІўЖЎ™ўВЎІЎѓўК ЎІўДЎ®Ў≥ўКЎЈ ўДўДЎ≥ўКЎІЎ≥ЎІЎ™ ўБўК ЎІўДЎ®ўДЎІЎѓ Ў•ўДўЙ Ў™ЎєЎ±ЎґўК ўДўДЎІЎ≠Ў™ЎђЎІЎ≤"ЎМ ўЕЎґўКўБЎІ Ў£ўЖ "ўВЎІЎ¶Ўѓ ЎІўДЎђўКЎі Ў£Ў®ўДЎЇўЖўК Ў®ЎІўДЎ®ўВЎІЎ° ўБўК ўЕўЖЎ≤ўДўК ўИЎєЎѓўЕ ЎІўДЎІЎ™ЎµЎІўД Ў®Ў£ўК ЎіЎЃЎµ" ўИЎ£ЎґЎІўБ ўБўК ЎІўДЎ™Ў≥ЎђўКўД ЎІўДўЕЎµўИЎ± "ўДЎ≥Ў™ Ў≥Ў®Ў®ЎІ ўДўДЎЃЎ±ЎІЎ® ўИЎІўДЎѓўЕЎІЎ± ЎІўДЎ∞ўК ўЕЎ≥ ЎІўДўЕЎ§Ў≥Ў≥ЎІЎ™"ЎМ ўГўЕЎІ ўВЎІўД "Ў£ўЖЎІ ўДЎ≥Ў™ ЎђЎ≤Ў°ЎІ ўЕўЖ Ў£ўК ўЕЎ§ЎІўЕЎ±Ў© Ў£ўИ Ў™Ў≠ЎІўДўБЎМ ўИўЕЎІ ўКўЗўЕўЖўК ўЗўИ ўЕЎµўДЎ≠Ў© ўИЎЈўЖўК".
=============

localized.description:
ўГЎіўБ ЎІўДЎ£ўЕўКЎ± ЎІўДЎ£Ў±ЎѓўЖўК Ў≠ўЕЎ≤Ў© Ў®ўЖ ЎІўДЎ≠Ў≥ўКўЖ Ў£ўЖўЗ ўВўКЎѓ ЎІўДЎ•ўВЎІўЕЎ© ЎІўДЎђЎ®Ў±ўКЎ© ўБўК ўЕўЖЎ≤ўДўЗ ўИЎ™ўЕ ЎІЎєЎ™ўВЎІўД Ў≠Ў±Ў≥ўЗ ЎІўДЎЃЎІЎµЎМ ўИЎ≥ЎЈ Ў™ўИўВўКўБ ЎІўДЎ≥ўДЎЈЎІЎ™ ЎІўДЎ£Ў±ЎѓўЖўКЎ© ЎіЎЃЎµўКЎІЎ™ Ў®ўКўЖўЗЎІ Ў±Ў¶ўКЎ≥ ЎІўДЎѓўКўИЎІўЖ ЎІўДўЕўДўГўК ЎІўДЎ£Ў≥Ў®ўВ Ў®ЎІЎ≥ўЕ Ў•Ў®Ў±ЎІўЗўКўЕ ЎєўИЎґ ЎІўДўДўЗ ўИЎҐЎЃЎ±ўИўЖ ўДЎ£Ў≥Ў®ЎІЎ® Ў£ўЕўЖўКЎ© ўДўЕ Ў™ўГЎіўБ Ў™ўБЎІЎµўКўДўЗЎІ Ў≠Ў™ўЙ ЎІўДЎҐўЖ ўИўВЎІўД ЎІўДЎ£ўЕўКЎ± Ў≠ўЕЎ≤Ў© Ў®ўЖ ЎІўДЎ≠Ў≥ўКўЖ ўБўК Ў™Ў≥ЎђўКўД ўЕЎµўИЎ± "Ў£Ў≥Ў™ЎЇЎ±Ў® Ў£ўЖ ўКЎ§ЎѓўК ЎІўЖЎ™ўВЎІЎѓўК ЎІўДЎ®Ў≥ўКЎЈ ўДўДЎ≥ўКЎІЎ≥ЎІЎ™ ўБўК ЎІўДЎ®ўДЎІЎѓ Ў•ўДўЙ Ў™ЎєЎ±ЎґўК ўДўДЎІЎ≠Ў™ЎђЎІЎ≤"ЎМ ўЕЎґўКўБЎІ Ў£ўЖ "ўВЎІЎ¶Ўѓ ЎІўДЎђўКЎі Ў£Ў®ўДЎЇўЖўК Ў®ЎІўДЎ®ўВЎІЎ° ўБўК ўЕўЖЎ≤ўДўК ўИЎєЎѓўЕ ЎІўДЎІЎ™ЎµЎІўД Ў®Ў£ўК ЎіЎЃЎµ" ўИЎ£ЎґЎІўБ ўБўК ЎІўДЎ™Ў≥ЎђўКўД ЎІўДўЕЎµўИЎ± "ўДЎ≥Ў™ Ў≥Ў®Ў®ЎІ ўДўДЎЃЎ±ЎІЎ® ўИЎІўДЎѓўЕЎІЎ± ЎІўДЎ∞ўК ўЕЎ≥ ЎІўДўЕЎ§Ў≥Ў≥ЎІЎ™"ЎМ ўГўЕЎІ ўВЎІўД "Ў£ўЖЎІ ўДЎ≥Ў™ ЎђЎ≤Ў°ЎІ ўЕўЖ Ў£ўК ўЕЎ§ЎІўЕЎ±Ў© Ў£ўИ Ў™Ў≠ЎІўДўБЎМ ўИўЕЎІ ўКўЗўЕўЖўК ўЗўИ ўЕЎµўДЎ≠Ў© ўИЎЈўЖўК".

snippet.title: Brawl Stars: Brawl Talk! Two New Brawlers, TONS of Skins, and a New Game mode!?
snippet.description:
Download NOW!! вЦЇвЦЇ https://supr.cl/playbrawl
Be a BRAWLER! Subscribe! вЦЇвЦЇ https://supr.cl/subscribe

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but donвАЩt let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your teamвАЩs safe and try to crack open your opponentsвАЩ. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove youвАЩre the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

Support:
Contact us in-game via Settings, Help and Support вАФ or visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/brawl-stars/

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent's Guide:
http://supercell.com/en/parents/

snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! рЯСА


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter вЦЇ https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram вЦЇhttps://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook вЦЇhttps://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-¬≠filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

ParentвАЩs Guide:
http://www.supercell.net/parents

en.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
en.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! рЯСА


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter вЦЇ https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram вЦЇhttps://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook вЦЇhttps://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-¬≠filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

ParentвАЩs Guide:
http://www.supercell.net/parents

snippet.title: ЎІўДЎ≠ўЕЎѓ ўДўДўЗ ЎєўДўЙ ўГўД Ў≠ЎІўД - ўКўИўЕўКЎІЎ™ ЎєЎµЎІЎ®Ў© Ў®ЎѓЎ±
snippet.description:
ЎІўДЎ≠ўЕЎѓ ўДўДўЗ ЎєўДўЙ ўГўД Ў≠ЎІўД - ўКўИўЕўКЎІЎ™ ЎєЎµЎІЎ®Ў© Ў®ЎѓЎ±

ЎІўЖЎ™Ў®ўЗўИЎІ ўБЎѓўКЎ™ўГўЕ ЎєўДўЙ ЎєўКўИўЖўГўЕ ўИЎІўЖЎ™ўЕ Ў™ЎіЎІўЗЎѓўИўЖ ЎІўДЎђўИЎІўД ЎІўИ ЎІўДЎ™ўДўБЎ≤ўКўИўЖ ЎђўИЎІўЖЎІ ўЖўВЎµ ўЖЎЄЎ±ўЗЎІ Ў®ЎіўГўД ўГЎ®ўКЎ± ўВЎ±ЎІЎ®Ў© ЎІўДЎґЎєўБ ўИўЕЎђЎ®ўИЎ±Ў© Ў™ўДЎ®Ў≥ ўЖЎЄЎІЎ±Ў© Ў®ЎіўГўД ўГЎІўЕўД ўДўЕЎѓЎ© Ў≥ўЖЎ™ўКўЖ ўГўДўЗ Ў®Ў≥Ў®Ў® ўВЎ±Ў®ўЗЎІ ўЕўЖ ЎІўДЎіЎІЎіЎ© ўИўДЎІ Ў™ўЖЎ≥ўИўЖ Ў™ўБЎ≠ЎµўИўЖ ўЖЎЄЎ±ўГўЕ ЎІЎ∞ЎІ Ў≠Ў≥ўКЎ™ўИЎІ Ў®ЎіўКЎ° ўБ ЎІўДЎєўКўЖЎІўЖ Ў≠Ў®ўКЎ®Ў™ЎІ ЎІўДЎ•ўЖЎ≥ЎІўЖ . 

ўБўДўИўВ ЎІўДўВўЖЎІЎ© ЎІўДЎ±Ў¶ўКЎ≥ўКЎ©
Ў±ЎѓЎ© ўБЎєўДўЗўЕ ЎєўДўЙ ўЕЎЄўЗЎ±ўК ЎІўДЎђЎѓўКЎѓ - ЎІўДЎµўЖЎѓўИўВ ЎІўДЎЇЎІўЕЎґ
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nHwO59oVoAQ&t=16s

snippet.title: Ў•Ў®Ў±ЎІўЕ ўЕўВЎѓЎ±Ўі ўКўВЎІўИўЕ ўГўИўЕўКЎѓўКЎІ Ў£ЎіЎ±ўБ ЎєЎ®Ўѓ ЎІўДЎ®ЎІўВўК ўИЎЃЎ±Ўђ ЎєўЖ ЎІўДўЖЎµ "Ў£ўЖЎ™ ўЖЎ≥ўКЎ™ ЎІўДўГўДЎІўЕЎЯ"рЯШВрЯШВ #ЎІўДўДўИўГЎІўЖЎѓЎ©
snippet.description:
ЎђЎ≤Ў° ўЕўЖ ЎІўДЎ≠ўДўВЎ© ЎІўДЎ≥ЎІЎѓЎ≥Ў©  ўЕўЖ ўЕЎ≥Ў±Ў≠ўКЎ© "ЎІўДўДўИўГЎІўЖЎѓЎ©

"ЎІўДўДўИўГЎІўЖЎѓЎ©" Ў≥ўКЎ™ ўГўИўЕ ўЕЎ≥Ў±Ў≠ўК ўЕўЖ Ў≠ўДўВЎІЎ™ ўЕЎ™ЎµўДЎ© ўЕўЖўБЎµўДЎ©ЎМ Ў™ЎѓўИЎ± Ў£Ў≠ЎѓЎІЎЂўЗЎІ Ў≠ўИўД Ў£Ў≥Ў±Ў© Ў™Ў™ЎєЎ±Ўґ ўДўЕўИЎІўВўБ ўГўИўЕўКЎѓўКЎ© ЎєЎѓўКЎѓЎ© ўБўКўЕЎІ Ў®ўКўЖўЗўЕЎМ Ў®Ў≥Ў®Ў® "ЎІўДўДўИўГЎІўЖЎѓЎ©" ЎІўДЎ™ўК ўКЎ™ЎіЎІЎ±ўГўИўЖ ўБўК ўЕўДўГўКЎ™ўЗЎІЎМ ўИЎ™ЎЃЎ™ўДўБ ЎЈЎ®ЎІЎє ўГўД ўЕўЖўЗўЕ ЎєўЖ ЎІўДЎҐЎЃЎ±.

Ў®ЎЈўИўДЎ© Ў£ЎіЎ±ўБ ЎєЎ®Ўѓ ЎІўДЎ®ЎІўВўКЎМ ЎѓўКЎІЎ®ЎМ Ў≠ўЕЎѓўК ЎІўДўЕўКЎ±ЎЇўЖўКЎМ ўИўКЎ≤ўИЎМ Ў•Ў®Ў±ЎІўЕ Ў≥ўЕўКЎ±ЎМ ўЖўИЎ±ўЗЎІўЖ ўЕўЖЎµўИЎ± ЎМЎ£Ў≠ўЕЎѓ ЎІўДЎЈўЕЎІўЖўКЎМ ЎєўДўК Ў≠ўЕЎѓўКЎМ ўИЎІЎ¶ўД ЎІўДЎєўИўЖўКЎМ ўЕЎ±ўКўЕ ЎІўДЎ®Ў≠Ў±ЎІўИўКЎМ ўКЎІЎ≥ўЕўКўЖ Ў≥ўЕўКЎ±ЎМ Ў£ўЕўКЎ±Ў© Ў≠ЎІўБЎЄЎМ ўЕЎ≠ўЕЎѓ Ў≠Ў≥ўЖЎМ ўЕЎ≠ўЕЎѓ Ў®ЎЈЎІўИўКЎМ Ў£Ў≠ўЕЎѓ ўБЎ±ЎђЎМ ўЕўКЎѓЎ±ўИўЖЎІЎМ Ў£Ў≠ўЕЎѓ ўБЎ™Ў≠ўКЎМ ўЕЎ≠ўЕЎѓ ўЖЎІЎђўК ЎђЎѓўИЎМ Ў£Ў≠ўЕЎѓ Ў£ЎіЎ±ўБЎМ ўЕЎµЎЈўБўЙ Ў≥ЎєўКЎѓЎМ ўЕЎµЎЈўБўЙ Ў≠ўЕЎ≤Ў©ЎМ ўЕЎ≠ўЕЎѓ ЎєЎµЎІўЕЎМ ЎіЎ±ўКўБ Ў≠Ў≥ўЖўК.

Ў™ЎєЎ±Ўґ ўГўД ЎђўЕЎєЎ© ўБўК Ў™ўЕЎІўЕ ЎІўДЎ≥ЎІЎєЎ© ЎІўДЎЂЎІўЕўЖЎ© ўЕЎ≥ЎІЎ°ЎМ ўЕўЖ Ў•ўЖЎ™ЎІЎђ Ў≥ўКўЖЎ±ЎђўК ўИўБўГЎ±Ў© ўИЎ•ЎЃЎ±ЎІЎђ Ў£ЎіЎ±ўБ ЎєЎ®Ўѓ ЎІўДЎ®ЎІўВўК.

ўГўДўЕЎІЎ™ ЎІўДЎІЎЇўЖўКЎ© : 
ЎЃЎІўКЎ® ЎІўДўИ ўЕЎіЎ™ЎІЏѓ ЎІўДўГ ўИўКўЖўГ ўЕўИ ЏѓўДЎ®ўК ўИЏѓўБ 
ЎЃЎІўКЎ® ЎІўДўИ Ў®Ў≥ Ў±Ўѓ ЎєўДўК ўЕўИ ўИЎђўЗўК ўДўИўЖўЗ ўЖЎЃЎЈўБ
ЏЖўЖўГ ўЖўЕЎ™ ўЖўИўЕ ЎІўДўЗўЖўЙ ўЗЎІ ўКўД Ў≠Ў® ЎіўИ ўЕЎЃЎ™ўБўК
ўЕЎ≠Ў™ЎІЎђўДўГ Ў≠ЎІЎђЎ© ўЗўИўЙ ўЕЎіЎ™ЎІЏѓ ЎІўДўГ ЏѓўДЎ®ўК ЎІўДўИўБўК 
Why did you hurt me, you go
ўИўКўЖ Ў≠ЎґўЖЏѓ ЎєўЖўК ЎµЎІЎ±
Why did you leave me, you go
ЎІўЖЎ™ ўЕЎІўК ўИЎІўЖўК ўЖЎІЎ± 
I am lost without you
ЎЃЎІўБ ўДЎІ ўЕўИЎ™ўЖ ЎѓЎЃўКўДўГ ўИЎ®ўКўГ ЎѓўДўКўЖўК ўИЎ£ЎђўКўДўГ
ЎЃЎІўКЎ® ЎІўДўИ ўЕЎіЎ™ЎІЏѓ ЎІўДўГ ўИўКўЖўГ ўЕўИ ЏѓўДЎ®ўК ўИЏѓўБ
ЎЃЎІўКЎ® ЎІўДўИ Ў®Ў≥ Ў±Ўѓ ЎєўДўК ўЕўИ ўИЎђўЗўК ўДўИўЖўЗ ўЖЎЃЎЈўБ
Gang, gang
ItвАЩs a middle eastern thang, bang
Body build like a million bags
Let me back, back, back that thang
Smoking sisha on privet jets
Driving Benz, Throwing money on gems
Ў≠Ў®ўКЎ®ўК ўЕЎІЎ±ўКЎѓ Ў®ЎєЎѓ Ў≠Ў≥ Ў≠Ў®ўКЎ®ўК ўЕўЕўЖўИЎє ЎІўК ўДўЕЎ≥
ЎєўЕЎ±ўК ўКўДЎІ ЎІЎ∞ўДўБ ўДўБ (ЎІўИўИўИ) ЎІўДўИўИ ЎІўДўИўИ ўДЎІ Ў™ЎЃЎІЎ®Ў± (Ў±ўИўИўИЎ≠)

love it, make, make you wanna want it,
 want it, go back to your bunny, bunny

snippet.title: Clash Royale Update: MAGIC ITEMS ARE HERE! (New Animation!)
snippet.description:
**NEW UPDATE IS HERE**
Upgrade Your Cards Faster with Magic Items!
Watch the Magic Items TV Royale: https://youtu.be/7rQvfqoLnmw

Subscribe for more! вЦЇвЦЇ http://supr.cl/SubRoyale

Enter the Arena! From the creators of Clash of Clans comes a real-time multiplayer game starring the Royales, your favorite Clash characters and much, much more.

Collect and upgrade dozens of cards featuring the Clash of Clans troops, spells and defenses you know and love, as well as the Royales: Princes, Knights, Baby Dragons and more. Knock the enemy King and Princesses from their towers to defeat your opponents and win Trophies, Crowns and glory in the Arena. Form a Clan to share cards and build your very own battle community.

Lead the Clash Royale Family to victory!

FEATURES
вАҐ Duel players from around the world in real-time in both 1v1 and 2v2 Battles
вАҐ Earn chests to unlock rewards, collect powerful new cards and upgrade existing ones
вАҐ Destroy opponent's towers and win Crowns to earn epic Crown chests
вАҐ Build and upgrade your card collection with the Clash Royale Family along with dozens of your favorite Clash troops, spells and defenses
вАҐ Construct your ultimate Battle Deck to defeat your opponents
вАҐ Progress through multiple Arenas all the way to the top
вАҐ Form a Clan to share cards and build your very own battle community
вАҐ Challenge your Clanmates and friends to a private duel, or play side-by-side in a 2v2 Battle
вАҐ Work together with your Clan to unlock Clan Chests
вАҐ Play new events every week
вАҐ Learn different battle tactics by watching the best duels on TV Royale

PLEASE NOTE! Clash Royale is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash Royale. A network connection is also required.

Support:
Are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clash-royale/ or contact us in-game by going to Settings, Help and support.

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent's Guide:

localized.title: Clash Royale Update: MAGIC ITEMS ARE HERE! (New Animation!)
localized.description:
**NEW UPDATE IS HERE**
Upgrade Your Cards Faster with Magic Items!
Watch the Magic Items TV Royale: https://youtu.be/7rQvfqoLnmw

Subscribe for more! вЦЇвЦЇ http://supr.cl/SubRoyale

Enter the Arena! From the creators of Clash of Clans comes a real-time multiplayer game starring the Royales, your favorite Clash characters and much, much more.

Collect and upgrade dozens of cards featuring the Clash of Clans troops, spells and defenses you know and love, as well as the Royales: Princes, Knights, Baby Dragons and more. Knock the enemy King and Princesses from their towers to defeat your opponents and win Trophies, Crowns and glory in the Arena. Form a Clan to share cards and build your very own battle community.

Lead the Clash Royale Family to victory!

FEATURES
вАҐ Duel players from around the world in real-time in both 1v1 and 2v2 Battles
вАҐ Earn chests to unlock rewards, collect powerful new cards and upgrade existing ones
вАҐ Destroy opponent's towers and win Crowns to earn epic Crown chests
вАҐ Build and upgrade your card collection with the Clash Royale Family along with dozens of your favorite Clash troops, spells and defenses
вАҐ Construct your ultimate Battle Deck to defeat your opponents
вАҐ Progress through multiple Arenas all the way to the top
вАҐ Form a Clan to share cards and build your very own battle community
вАҐ Challenge your Clanmates and friends to a private duel, or play side-by-side in a 2v2 Battle
вАҐ Work together with your Clan to unlock Clan Chests
вАҐ Play new events every week
вАҐ Learn different battle tactics by watching the best duels on TV Royale

PLEASE NOTE! Clash Royale is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash Royale. A network connection is also required.

Support:
Are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clash-royale/ or contact us in-game by going to Settings, Help and support.

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

snippet.description:
Ў≥Ў™ ЎІўДЎ®ўЖЎІЎ™
Ў£ЎѓЎІЎ°: Ў±ўКЎ™ЎіЎІЎ±Ўѓ
ўГўД ЎІўДЎіўГЎ± ўДўЕўЖ Ў≥ЎІўЗўЕ ўБўК ўЖЎђЎІЎ≠ ўЗЎ∞ЎІ ЎІўДЎєўЕўДрЯМє

ўГўДўЕЎІЎ™: ЎЈЎІЎ±ўВ ЎІўДЎµЎ®ЎІЎЇ

Ў£ўДЎ≠ЎІўЖ: ЎЄЎІўБЎ± ЎђўЖўКЎѓ

Ў™ўИЎ≤ўКЎє ўЕўИЎ≥ўКўВўК ўИўЕўКўГЎ≥ ўИўЕЎІЎ≥Ў™Ў±ўКўЖЎЇ:  ўБЎ§ЎІЎѓ ЎђўЖўКЎѓ

ўБўГЎ±Ў© ўИЎ≥ўКўЖЎІЎ±ўКўИ ўИЎ±Ў§ўКЎ©: ЎєЎ®ЎѓЎІўДЎ≠ўЕўКЎѓ Ў≥ўДЎІЎ™

Ў™ЎµўИўКЎ± ўИўЕўИўЖЎ™ЎІЎђ: ўЕЎ≠ўЕЎѓ ЎђЎ®ЎІўИўК

ўБЎ±ўКўВ ЎІўДЎєўЕўД: ЎіЎІЎѓўК ЎђЎ®ЎІўИўК ўИ Ў£ўЕўКЎ± ЎІўДЎµЎІўКЎЇ

Ў•ЎЃЎ±ЎІЎђ: ўЕЎІўКЎ≤ Ў±ЎіўКЎѓ

вАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФ

ЎєўКўДЎ© Ў±ўКЎ™ЎіўИ ўИўЖўЖўИЎі ўИЎєЎѓўЖЎІўГўЕ ўИўЖўБЎ∞ўЖЎІ ўИЎєЎѓўЖЎІрЯТ™рЯПїрЯТ™рЯПї ўИЎІўДЎ≠ўЕЎѓ ўДўДўЗ ЎІўДЎєўЕўД ўГЎІўЖ ЎђЎѓЎІўЛ Ў±ЎІЎ¶Ўє ўИўЕўЖўИЎєЎѓўГўЕ Ў®Ў£ЎєўЕЎІўД Ў£ўВўИўЙ ўИЎ£ўВўИўЙ ўЗЎІЎѓ Ў£ўВўД ЎіўКЎ° ўЕўЕўГўЖ ўЖўВЎѓўЕўИЎІ ўДЎєўКўДЎ™ўЖЎІ ЎІўДЎЂЎІўЖўКЎ© ўЕўЖЎ≠Ў®ўГўЕ ўГЎ™ўКЎ±вЭ§пЄП
вАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФ-
ўГўДўЕЎІЎ™ ЎІўДЎ£ЎЇўЖўКЎ©

ўГўДўЕЎІЎ™ ЎІўДЎ≠Ў® ЎІЎіЎ™ўГўИЎІ ўЕўЖ ЎђўЕЎІўДўГ ЎѓўВЎІЎ™ ЎІўДўВўДЎ® ўЕЎІЎ®Ў™ўЗўИўЙ Ў®ЎѓЎІўДўГ Ў£ўЖЎ™ўК ўГўДўГ ЎєўБўИўКЎ© Ў≠Ў±ўГЎІЎ™ўГ ўЕЎі ўЕЎµЎЈўЖЎєЎ© ўКЎ≥ўДўЕўДўК ЎІўДўГўДўИЎІ Ў≠ўЖўКЎ© ЎІўДЎ±ўВЎ© ўИЎІўДЎѓўДЎє Ў®ЎЈЎ®ЎєЎІ
ўКЎІЎ≥Ў™ ЎІўДЎ®ўЖЎІЎ™ ЎЃўБўК ЎєўДўКўЖЎІ ЎЃўБўК Ў≠Ў™ўЙ ЎІўДўДўК ўГЎІўЖ Ў®ўКўГЎ±ўЗўЖўК Ў≠ўЖ ўИўВўБ ЎµўБўК ўДўИ Ў®ўВЎѓўЕ ўВўДЎ®ўК ўИЎ±ўИЎ≠ўК Ў®ЎєЎ±ўБ ўЕЎІЎ®ўГўБўК
ўКЎІЎіўЕЎ≥ ЎІўДЎіЎ™ЎІ ўКўДўК ЎІўДЎ®ЎіЎ± Ў®Ў™Ў≠Ў®ЎІ ўИўКЎІўВўЕЎ± ЎІўДўЕЎ≥ЎІ Ў®ўИЎ≠ўИЎѓўЗЎІ Ў£ўЖЎ™ Ў™ЎЃЎ®ЎІ Ў±Ў≠ ЎЇўЖўК ўИЎЇўЖўК ўИЎЇўЖўК ўИЎ£Ў®ўВўЙ ўДўВЎ±Ў®ўГ ўЕЎ™ўЕўЖўК ЎІўДўДўЗ ўКЎђўЕЎєўЖўК ўБўКўГўК ўИЎ™ЎµўКЎ±ўК ўДЎ•ўЕўК ўГўЖўК
Ў±Ў≠ Ў≥ўЕЎєўГ ЎЇЎ≤ўД ўИЎєЎЈўКўГўК Ў≠ўЖЎІўЖўК ўИўКЎІЎіўЗЎѓ ЎІўДЎєЎ≥ўД Ў•ўЖЎ™ўК ЎµЎ±Ў™ўК Ў•ЎѓўЕЎІўЖўК ЎЃўДўК ўГўД ЎІўДЎѓўЖўКЎІ Ў™ЎЇЎІЎ± ўКЎІЎєўКўИўЖўК ўГЎ®ЎІЎ± ўИЎµЎЇЎІЎ± ўИўКЎђўКЎ®ўИ Ў•Ў≥ўЕўК Ў®ЎІўДЎ£ЎЃЎ®ЎІЎ± Ў≠Ў®ўК ЎђўИЎІ ўВўДЎ®ўГ ЎµЎІЎ±.

localized.title: Ў≥Ў™ ЎІўДЎ®ўЖЎІЎ™ - Ў±ўКЎ™ЎіЎІЎ±Ўѓ ( ўБўКЎѓўКўИ ўГўДўКЎ® ) Rishard - Sit Albanat (Official Music Video 2021)
localized.description:
Ў≥Ў™ ЎІўДЎ®ўЖЎІЎ™
Ў£ЎѓЎІЎ°: Ў±ўКЎ™ЎіЎІЎ±Ўѓ
ўГўД ЎІўДЎіўГЎ± ўДўЕўЖ Ў≥ЎІўЗўЕ ўБўК ўЖЎђЎІЎ≠ ўЗЎ∞ЎІ ЎІўДЎєўЕўДрЯМє

ўГўДўЕЎІЎ™: ЎЈЎІЎ±ўВ ЎІўДЎµЎ®ЎІЎЇ

Ў£ўДЎ≠ЎІўЖ: ЎЄЎІўБЎ± ЎђўЖўКЎѓ

Ў™ўИЎ≤ўКЎє ўЕўИЎ≥ўКўВўК ўИўЕўКўГЎ≥ ўИўЕЎІЎ≥Ў™Ў±ўКўЖЎЇ:  ўБЎ§ЎІЎѓ ЎђўЖўКЎѓ

ўБўГЎ±Ў© ўИЎ≥ўКўЖЎІЎ±ўКўИ ўИЎ±Ў§ўКЎ©: ЎєЎ®ЎѓЎІўДЎ≠ўЕўКЎѓ Ў≥ўДЎІЎ™

Ў™ЎµўИўКЎ± ўИўЕўИўЖЎ™ЎІЎђ: ўЕЎ≠ўЕЎѓ ЎђЎ®ЎІўИўК

ўБЎ±ўКўВ ЎІўДЎєўЕўД: ЎіЎІЎѓўК ЎђЎ®ЎІўИўК ўИ Ў£ўЕўКЎ± ЎІўДЎµЎІўКЎЇ

Ў•ЎЃЎ±ЎІЎђ: ўЕЎІўКЎ≤ Ў±ЎіўКЎѓ

вАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФ

ЎєўКўДЎ© Ў±ўКЎ™ЎіўИ ўИўЖўЖўИЎі ўИЎєЎѓўЖЎІўГўЕ ўИўЖўБЎ∞ўЖЎІ ўИЎєЎѓўЖЎІрЯТ™рЯПїрЯТ™рЯПї ўИЎІўДЎ≠ўЕЎѓ ўДўДўЗ ЎІўДЎєўЕўД ўГЎІўЖ ЎђЎѓЎІўЛ Ў±ЎІЎ¶Ўє ўИўЕўЖўИЎєЎѓўГўЕ Ў®Ў£ЎєўЕЎІўД Ў£ўВўИўЙ ўИЎ£ўВўИўЙ ўЗЎІЎѓ Ў£ўВўД ЎіўКЎ° ўЕўЕўГўЖ ўЖўВЎѓўЕўИЎІ ўДЎєўКўДЎ™ўЖЎІ ЎІўДЎЂЎІўЖўКЎ© ўЕўЖЎ≠Ў®ўГўЕ ўГЎ™ўКЎ±вЭ§пЄП
вАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФ-
ўГўДўЕЎІЎ™ ЎІўДЎ£ЎЇўЖўКЎ©

ўГўДўЕЎІЎ™ ЎІўДЎ≠Ў® ЎІЎіЎ™ўГўИЎІ ўЕўЖ ЎђўЕЎІўДўГ ЎѓўВЎІЎ™ ЎІўДўВўДЎ® ўЕЎІЎ®Ў™ўЗўИўЙ Ў®ЎѓЎІўДўГ Ў£ўЖЎ™ўК ўГўДўГ ЎєўБўИўКЎ© Ў≠Ў±ўГЎІЎ™ўГ ўЕЎі ўЕЎµЎЈўЖЎєЎ© ўКЎ≥ўДўЕўДўК ЎІўДўГўДўИЎІ Ў≠ўЖўКЎ© ЎІўДЎ±ўВЎ© ўИЎІўДЎѓўДЎє Ў®ЎЈЎ®ЎєЎІ
ўКЎІЎ≥Ў™ ЎІўДЎ®ўЖЎІЎ™ ЎЃўБўК ЎєўДўКўЖЎІ ЎЃўБўК Ў≠Ў™ўЙ ЎІўДўДўК ўГЎІўЖ Ў®ўКўГЎ±ўЗўЖўК Ў≠ўЖ ўИўВўБ ЎµўБўК ўДўИ Ў®ўВЎѓўЕ ўВўДЎ®ўК ўИЎ±ўИЎ≠ўК Ў®ЎєЎ±ўБ ўЕЎІЎ®ўГўБўК
ўКЎІЎіўЕЎ≥ ЎІўДЎіЎ™ЎІ ўКўДўК ЎІўДЎ®ЎіЎ± Ў®Ў™Ў≠Ў®ЎІ ўИўКЎІўВўЕЎ± ЎІўДўЕЎ≥ЎІ Ў®ўИЎ≠ўИЎѓўЗЎІ Ў£ўЖЎ™ Ў™ЎЃЎ®ЎІ Ў±Ў≠ ЎЇўЖўК ўИЎЇўЖўК ўИЎЇўЖўК ўИЎ£Ў®ўВўЙ ўДўВЎ±Ў®ўГ ўЕЎ™ўЕўЖўК ЎІўДўДўЗ ўКЎђўЕЎєўЖўК ўБўКўГўК ўИЎ™ЎµўКЎ±ўК ўДЎ•ўЕўК ўГўЖўК
Ў±Ў≠ Ў≥ўЕЎєўГ ЎЇЎ≤ўД ўИЎєЎЈўКўГўК Ў≠ўЖЎІўЖўК ўИўКЎІЎіўЗЎѓ ЎІўДЎєЎ≥ўД Ў•ўЖЎ™ўК ЎµЎ±Ў™ўК Ў•ЎѓўЕЎІўЖўК ЎЃўДўК ўГўД ЎІўДЎѓўЖўКЎІ Ў™ЎЇЎІЎ± ўКЎІЎєўКўИўЖўК ўГЎ®ЎІЎ± ўИЎµЎЇЎІЎ± ўИўКЎђўКЎ®ўИ Ў•Ў≥ўЕўК Ў®ЎІўДЎ£ЎЃЎ®ЎІЎ± Ў≠Ў®ўК ЎђўИЎІ ўВўДЎ®ўГ ЎµЎІЎ±.

snippet.title: ЎІўДЎІЎєўДЎІўЖ ЎІўДЎ±Ў≥ўЕўК ўДўЕЎ≥ўДЎ≥ўД " ўЖЎ≥ўД ЎІўДЎ£ЎЇЎ±ЎІЎ® " ўВЎ±ўКЎ®ЎҐ #Ў±ўЕЎґЎІўЖ_2021
snippet.description:
ЎІўДЎІЎєўДЎІўЖ ЎІўДЎ±Ў≥ўЕўК ўДўЕЎ≥ўДЎ≥ўД  #ўЖЎ≥ўД_ЎІўДЎ£ЎЇЎ±ЎІЎ®  ЎІЎ≠ўЕЎѓ ЎІўДЎ≥ўВЎІ ЎІўЕўКЎ± ўГЎ±ЎІЎ±Ў©  ўВЎ±ўКЎ®ЎҐ #Ў±ўЕЎґЎІўЖ_2021

ўКЎ™ўЖЎІўИўД ўЕЎ≥ўДЎ≥ўД #ўЖЎ≥ўД_ЎІўДЎ£ЎЇЎ±ЎІЎ® ўБўК Ў•ЎЈЎІЎ± ЎѓЎ±ЎІўЕўК ЎІЎђЎ™ўЕЎІЎєўК ўВЎµЎ© ўЕўЖ ўВЎµЎµ ЎІўДўЕЎђЎ™ўЕЎє ЎІўДЎµЎєўКЎѓўК ЎІўДўЕЎµЎ±ўКЎМ ўБЎ®ЎєЎѓ ЎІЎ™ўЗЎІўЕўЗ Ў®ЎІўДўВЎ™ўД ўИўВЎґЎІЎ° ўБЎ™Ў±Ў© ЎєўВўИЎ®Ў© 
ЎЈўИўКўДЎ© Ў®ЎІўДЎ≥ЎђўЖЎМ ўКЎЃЎ±Ўђ ўБўКЎђЎѓ ЎµЎѓўКўВўЗ ўВЎѓ Ў™Ў≤ўИЎђ ўЕўЖ ЎІўЕЎ±Ў£Ў™ўЗ ўИўЖЎ≥Ў® ЎІЎ®ўЖўЗ Ў•ўДўКўЗЎМ ўБўКўВЎ±Ў± ЎІўДЎІўЖЎ™ўВЎІўЕ ўЕўЖўЗ.

ўЕЎ≥ўДЎ≥ўД #ўЖЎ≥ўД_ЎІўДЎ£ЎЇЎ±ЎІЎ® Ў®ЎЈўИўДЎ© ЎІўДўЖЎђўЕўКўЖ Ў£Ў≠ўЕЎѓ ЎІўДЎ≥ўВЎІ ўИЎ£ўЕўКЎ± ўГЎ±ЎІЎ±Ў© ўИўКЎіЎІЎ±ўГ ўБўЙ Ў®ЎЈўИўДЎ© ЎІўДЎєўЕўД ўЕўК ЎєўЕЎ±ЎМ ЎѓўКЎІЎ®ЎМ ўЖЎђўДЎІЎ° Ў®ЎѓЎ±ЎМ Ў•ЎѓўИЎІЎ±ЎѓЎМ ўБЎ±ЎѓўИЎ≥ ЎєЎ®Ўѓ ЎІўДЎ≠ўЕўКЎѓЎМ Ў£Ў≠ўЕЎѓ ўЕЎІўДўГЎМ Ў£Ў≠ўЕЎѓ ЎѓЎІЎіЎМ Ў±ўКўЕ Ў≥ЎІўЕўЙЎМ ўЕЎ≠ўЕЎѓ ЎђўЕЎєЎ©ЎМ ЎєўЕЎІЎѓ Ў≤ўКЎІЎѓЎ©ЎМ Ў£Ў≠ўЕЎѓ ўБўЗўКўЕЎМ ўДўКЎІўД ЎєЎ®Ўѓ ЎІўДЎЃЎІўДўВ 
 Ў™Ў£ўДўКўБ ўИЎ•ЎЃЎ±ЎІЎђ : ўЕЎ≠ўЕЎѓ Ў≥ЎІўЕўЙ
Ў•ўЖЎ™ЎІЎђ ЎіЎ±ўГЎ© Ў≥ўКўЖЎ±ЎђўЙ

Ў•ўЖЎ™ЎІЎђ :  #Synergy - Ў™ЎІўЕЎ± ўЕЎ±Ў≥ўК

ЎіЎ±ўГЎ© Ў≥ўКўЖЎ±ЎђўЙ ўДўДЎІўЖЎ™ЎІЎђ ЎІўДЎ™ўДўКўБЎ≤ўКўИўЖўЙ ўИЎІўДЎ≥ўКўЖўЕЎІЎ¶ўЙ
ўИЎЃЎѓўЕЎІЎ™ ЎІўДЎѓЎєЎІўКЎ© ўИЎІўДЎ•ЎєўДЎІўЖ ўИЎІўДЎєўДЎІўВЎІЎ™ ЎІўДЎєЎІўЕўЗ
ЎІЎіЎ™Ў±ўГ ўБўЙ ЎІўДўВўЖЎІЎ© ЎІўДЎ±Ў≥ўЕўКЎ© : http://bit.ly/Synergyofficial

localized.title: ЎІўДЎІЎєўДЎІўЖ ЎІўДЎ±Ў≥ўЕўК ўДўЕЎ≥ўДЎ≥ўД " ўЖЎ≥ўД ЎІўДЎ£ЎЇЎ±ЎІЎ® " ўВЎ±ўКЎ®ЎҐ #Ў±ўЕЎґЎІўЖ_2021
localized.description:
ЎІўДЎІЎєўДЎІўЖ ЎІўДЎ±Ў≥ўЕўК ўДўЕЎ≥ўДЎ≥ўД  #ўЖЎ≥ўД_ЎІўДЎ£ЎЇЎ±ЎІЎ®  ЎІЎ≠ўЕЎѓ ЎІўДЎ≥ўВЎІ ЎІўЕўКЎ± ўГЎ±ЎІЎ±Ў©  ўВЎ±ўКЎ®ЎҐ #Ў±ўЕЎґЎІўЖ_2021

ўКЎ™ўЖЎІўИўД ўЕЎ≥ўДЎ≥ўД #ўЖЎ≥ўД_ЎІўДЎ£ЎЇЎ±ЎІЎ® ўБўК Ў•ЎЈЎІЎ± ЎѓЎ±ЎІўЕўК ЎІЎђЎ™ўЕЎІЎєўК ўВЎµЎ© ўЕўЖ ўВЎµЎµ ЎІўДўЕЎђЎ™ўЕЎє ЎІўДЎµЎєўКЎѓўК ЎІўДўЕЎµЎ±ўКЎМ ўБЎ®ЎєЎѓ ЎІЎ™ўЗЎІўЕўЗ Ў®ЎІўДўВЎ™ўД ўИўВЎґЎІЎ° ўБЎ™Ў±Ў© ЎєўВўИЎ®Ў© 
ЎЈўИўКўДЎ© Ў®ЎІўДЎ≥ЎђўЖЎМ ўКЎЃЎ±Ўђ ўБўКЎђЎѓ ЎµЎѓўКўВўЗ ўВЎѓ Ў™Ў≤ўИЎђ ўЕўЖ ЎІўЕЎ±Ў£Ў™ўЗ ўИўЖЎ≥Ў® ЎІЎ®ўЖўЗ Ў•ўДўКўЗЎМ ўБўКўВЎ±Ў± ЎІўДЎІўЖЎ™ўВЎІўЕ ўЕўЖўЗ.

ўЕЎ≥ўДЎ≥ўД #ўЖЎ≥ўД_ЎІўДЎ£ЎЇЎ±ЎІЎ® Ў®ЎЈўИўДЎ© ЎІўДўЖЎђўЕўКўЖ Ў£Ў≠ўЕЎѓ ЎІўДЎ≥ўВЎІ ўИЎ£ўЕўКЎ± ўГЎ±ЎІЎ±Ў© ўИўКЎіЎІЎ±ўГ ўБўЙ Ў®ЎЈўИўДЎ© ЎІўДЎєўЕўД ўЕўК ЎєўЕЎ±ЎМ ЎѓўКЎІЎ®ЎМ ўЖЎђўДЎІЎ° Ў®ЎѓЎ±ЎМ Ў•ЎѓўИЎІЎ±ЎѓЎМ ўБЎ±ЎѓўИЎ≥ ЎєЎ®Ўѓ ЎІўДЎ≠ўЕўКЎѓЎМ Ў£Ў≠ўЕЎѓ ўЕЎІўДўГЎМ Ў£Ў≠ўЕЎѓ ЎѓЎІЎіЎМ Ў±ўКўЕ Ў≥ЎІўЕўЙЎМ ўЕЎ≠ўЕЎѓ ЎђўЕЎєЎ©ЎМ ЎєўЕЎІЎѓ Ў≤ўКЎІЎѓЎ©ЎМ Ў£Ў≠ўЕЎѓ ўБўЗўКўЕЎМ ўДўКЎІўД ЎєЎ®Ўѓ ЎІўДЎЃЎІўДўВ 
 Ў™Ў£ўДўКўБ ўИЎ•ЎЃЎ±ЎІЎђ : ўЕЎ≠ўЕЎѓ Ў≥ЎІўЕўЙ

snippet.title: Joe Biden stumbles on steps of Air Force One
snippet.description:
The US president stumbled while boarding Air Force One on his way to visit to Atlanta, Georgia, to meet with Asian American community leaders. Biden tripped on the steps up to the plane, before recovering and carrying on unaided, turning to salute at the top. The 78-year-old fractured his right foot in November 2020 while playing with his dog Major

вАҐ рЭРГрЭР®рЭР∞рЭРІрЭР•рЭР®рЭРЪрЭРЭ рЭРНрЭР®рЭР∞ : https://Digital-Sound.lnk.to/Meen-Fe-Dol

вАҐ Composition : Islam Shetoos ( Al Azra2 ) & Ahmed Kamel | ЎІЎ≥ўДЎІўЕ ЎіўКЎ™ўИЎ≥ ( ЎІўДЎІЎ≤Ў±ўВ ) ўИ ЎІЎ≠ўЕЎѓ ўГЎІўЕўД
вАҐ Music Arrangement : Islam Shetoos ( Al Azra2 ) | ( ЎІўДЎІЎ≤Ў±ўВ ) ЎІЎ≥ўДЎІўЕ ЎіўКЎ™ўИЎ≥
вАҐ Violin : Maged Sorour | ўЕЎІЎђЎѓ Ў≥Ў±ўИЎ±
вАҐ Solo : Gilba | ЎђўДЎ®ўЗ
вАҐ Vocal Mixing & Mastering : Ammar Khater | ЎєўЕЎІЎ± ЎЃЎІЎЈЎ±

вАҐ Produced By : Gamma Music

вАҐ рЭРЛрЭР≤рЭРЂрЭРҐрЭРЬрЭРђ | ўГўДўЕЎІЎ™ ЎІўДЎ£ЎЇўЖўКЎ© :

Ў®Ў≥Ў±Ў≠ Ў≥ЎІЎєЎІЎ™ .. ўИЎІўБЎ™Ў≠ ЎµўИЎ± Ў£ўКЎІўЕ Ў≤ўЕЎІўЖ 
ўИЎ®ўВўИўД ўКЎІ ўЕўКўЖ .. ўКЎµЎІўДЎ≠ўЖўК Ўє ЎІўДўЕЎІЎґўК ЎІўДўДўК ўГЎІўЖ 
ўИўГЎ™ўКЎ± Ў®ўВўИўД 
ўВўОўДЎ®ўК ЎІўДЎ≠ўВўКўВўК ўЕўКўЖ ўБўА ЎѓўИўД 
ўИЎІЎ≤ЎІўК Ў£ЎєўКЎі ўИЎІўЖЎІ ўЕЎі ўЕЎѓўК ўДўЖўБЎ≥ўК ЎІўДЎ£ўЕЎІўЖ 
ЎІўЖЎІ ўЕўЖ Ў≤ўЕЎІўЖ ... ўБўКўЗ Ў≥Ў± ўБўАўР ўВўОўДЎ®ўК ўИўЕЎѓЎІЎ±ўКЎ©
ЎІўЖЎІ ўЕЎі ЎІўЖЎІ ... ЎѓўЗ Ў≠Ўѓ ЎЇўКЎ±ўК ЎІўЖЎІ ўЕЎІЎіўК Ў®ўКўЗ 
Ў≤ўК ЎІўДўДўК ўБЎІўВ 
ўДўВўЙ ўЖўБЎ≥ўЗ ўЕЎі ЎђўИЎ© ЎІўДЎ≥Ў®ЎІўВ 
ўИЎІўДЎєўЕЎ± ўБЎІЎ™ ўВЎѓЎІўЕ ЎєўКўЖўКўЗ ўИўЕЎІЎєЎІЎі ўБўКўЗ 
ЎІЎЃЎѓЎ™ўЖўК ўЕўЖўК ЎІўДЎѓўЖўКЎІ ўБЎђЎ£Ў© ... ўИЎЇЎ±Ў®Ў™ўЖўК ўЕЎІ Ў®ўКўЖ ўИЎіўИЎі 
ўИЎєЎ±ўБЎ™ ўБўКўЗЎІ ЎІўДЎЈўКЎ®ўКўЖ  ... ўИЎІўДЎ≠Ў≤ўЖ Ў≠ўИўСўДўЗўЕ ўИЎ≠ўИЎі 
ўИЎ®ЎЃЎі ўБўАўР  ўВўОўДЎ®ўК ўГўД ўКўИўЕ 
ЎІўЕЎіўК ўЕЎІ Ў®ўКўЖ ЎђЎ±Ў≠ ўИўЗўЕўИўЕ 
ўГЎІўЖ ўБўКўЗ ўЗўЖЎІ ЎІўЖЎ≥ЎІўЖ ЎђўЕўКўД .. Ў®Ў≥Ў£ўД ЎєўДўКўЗ ўИўЕЎІЎ®ўДўВЎІўЗўИЎі
ўЕЎ≠Ў®ўИЎ≥ ўБўАўР Ў±ўИЎ≠ўГ .. ўИЎі Ў™ЎІўЖўК Ў®ўКЎѓЎІЎ±ўКўГ 
ўКЎІўЕЎІ ўВўИўДЎ™ ЎҐўЗ .. ўИўДЎІ ЎєўЕЎ± Ў≠Ўѓ Ў≠ўОЎ≥ Ў®ўКўГ 
ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ≥ Ў™ўВўИўД 
ЎІўЖўГ Ў™ЎєўКЎі ўБўАўР ЎІўДЎЇЎ±Ў®Ў© ЎЃўИўБ 
ЎЈЎ® Ў™ЎєўЕўД ЎІўКЎ© ўДўИ Ў™Ў®ўВўЙ ЎІўДЎЇЎ±Ў®Ў© ЎєЎІўКЎіЎ© ўБўКўГ 
ЎЈўИўД ЎІўДЎ≥ўЖўКўЖ .. ўИЎІўЖЎІ ЎІўКЎѓ ўБўАўР ЎђўЖЎ© ўИЎІўКЎѓ ўБўАўР ўЖЎІЎ± 
ўИЎ®ўВўИўД Ў®ЎЃўКЎ± ... ўИЎ®ЎЃЎ®ўК ЎІўДЎђЎѓ ўБўАўР ЎІўДўЗЎ≤ЎІЎ± 
ўЕЎІЎ®ўВЎІЎі ўБўКўЗ Ў≠ўКўД 
ўИўЕЎІўДўКЎі ЎµЎ≠ЎІЎ® ЎЇўКЎ±ўГ ўКЎІ ўДўКўД 
ўИЎІўДўДўКўД ЎЈўИўКўДЎМ ўИўДЎІ ўЕЎ±Ў© ЎђўЗ Ў®ЎєЎѓўЗ ЎІўДўЖўЗЎІЎ±

ўДўВўЙ ўЖўБЎ≥ўЗ ўЕЎі ЎђўИЎ© ЎІўДЎ≥Ў®ЎІўВ 
ўИЎІўДЎєўЕЎ± ўБЎІЎ™ ўВЎѓЎІўЕ ЎєўКўЖўКўЗ ўИўЕЎІЎєЎІЎі ўБўКўЗ 
ЎІЎЃЎѓЎ™ўЖўК ўЕўЖўК ЎІўДЎѓўЖўКЎІ ўБЎђЎ£Ў© ... ўИЎЇЎ±Ў®Ў™ўЖўК ўЕЎІ Ў®ўКўЖ ўИЎіўИЎі 
ўИЎєЎ±ўБЎ™ ўБўКўЗЎІ ЎІўДЎЈўКЎ®ўКўЖ  ... ўИЎІўДЎ≠Ў≤ўЖ Ў≠ўИўСўДўЗўЕ ўИЎ≠ўИЎі 
ўИЎ®ЎЃЎі ўБўАўР  ўВўОўДЎ®ўК ўГўД ўКўИўЕ 
ЎІўЕЎіўК ўЕЎІ Ў®ўКўЖ ЎђЎ±Ў≠ ўИўЗўЕўИўЕ 
ўГЎІўЖ ўБўКўЗ ўЗўЖЎІ ЎІўЖЎ≥ЎІўЖ ЎђўЕўКўД .. Ў®Ў≥Ў£ўД ЎєўДўКўЗ ўИўЕЎІЎ®ўДўВЎІўЗўИЎі
ўЕЎ≠Ў®ўИЎ≥ ўБўАўР Ў±ўИЎ≠ўГ .. ўИЎі Ў™ЎІўЖўК Ў®ўКЎѓЎІЎ±ўКўГ 
ўКЎІўЕЎІ ўВўИўДЎ™ ЎҐўЗ .. ўИўДЎІ ЎєўЕЎ± Ў≠Ўѓ Ў≠ўОЎ≥ Ў®ўКўГ 
ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ≥ Ў™ўВўИўД 
ЎІўЖўГ Ў™ЎєўКЎі ўБўАўР ЎІўДЎЇЎ±Ў®Ў© ЎЃўИўБ 
ЎЈЎ® Ў™ЎєўЕўД ЎІўКЎ© ўДўИ Ў™Ў®ўВўЙ ЎІўДЎЇЎ±Ў®Ў© ЎєЎІўКЎіЎ© ўБўКўГ 
ЎЈўИўД ЎІўДЎ≥ўЖўКўЖ .. ўИЎІўЖЎІ ЎІўКЎѓ ўБўАўР ЎђўЖЎ© ўИЎІўКЎѓ ўБўАўР ўЖЎІЎ± 
ўИЎ®ўВўИўД Ў®ЎЃўКЎ± ... ўИЎ®ЎЃЎ®ўК ЎІўДЎђЎѓ ўБўАўР ЎІўДўЗЎ≤ЎІЎ± 
ўЕЎІЎ®ўВЎІЎі ўБўКўЗ Ў≠ўКўД 
ўИўЕЎІўДўКЎі ЎµЎ≠ЎІЎ® ЎЇўКЎ±ўГ ўКЎІ ўДўКўД 
ўИЎІўДўДўКўД ЎЈўИўКўДЎМ ўИўДЎІ ўЕЎ±Ў© ЎђўЗ Ў®ЎєЎѓўЗ ЎІўДўЖўЗЎІЎ±

Ў®Ў≥Ў±Ў≠ Ў≥ЎІЎєЎІЎ™ .. ўИЎІўБЎ™Ў≠ ЎµўИЎ± Ў£ўКЎІўЕ Ў≤ўЕЎІўЖ 
ўИЎ®ўВўИўД ўКЎІ ўЕўКўЖ .. ўКЎµЎІўДЎ≠ўЖўК Ўє ЎІўДўЕЎІЎґўК ЎІўДўДўК ўГЎІўЖ 
ўИўГЎ™ўКЎ± Ў®ўВўИўД 
ўВўОўДЎ®ўК ЎІўДЎ≠ўВўКўВўК ўЕўКўЖ ўБўА ЎѓўИўД 
ўИЎІЎ≤ЎІўК Ў£ЎєўКЎі ўИЎІўЖЎІ ўЕЎі ўЕЎѓўК ўДўЖўБЎ≥ўК ЎІўДЎ£ўЕЎІўЖ 
ЎІўЖЎІ ўЕўЖ Ў≤ўЕЎІўЖ ... ўБўКўЗ Ў≥Ў± ўБўАўР ўВўОўДЎ®ўК ўИўЕЎѓЎІЎ±ўКЎ©
ЎІўЖЎІ ўЕЎі ЎІўЖЎІ ... ЎѓўЗ Ў≠Ўѓ ЎЇўКЎ±ўК ЎІўЖЎІ ўЕЎІЎіўК Ў®ўКўЗ 
Ў≤ўК ЎІўДўДўК ўБЎІўВ 
ўДўВўЙ ўЖўБЎ≥ўЗ ўЕЎі ЎђўИЎ© ЎІўДЎ≥Ў®ЎІўВ 
ўИЎІўДЎєўЕЎ± ўБЎІЎ™ ўВЎѓЎІўЕ ЎєўКўЖўКўЗ ўИўЕЎІЎєЎІЎі ўБўКўЗ 
ЎІЎЃЎѓЎ™ўЖўК ўЕўЖўК ЎІўДЎѓўЖўКЎІ ўБЎђЎ£Ў© ... ўИЎЇЎ±Ў®Ў™ўЖўК ўЕЎІ Ў®ўКўЖ ўИЎіўИЎі 
ўИЎєЎ±ўБЎ™ ўБўКўЗЎІ ЎІўДЎЈўКЎ®ўКўЖ  ... ўИЎІўДЎ≠Ў≤ўЖ Ў≠ўИўСўДўЗўЕ ўИЎ≠ўИЎі 
ўИЎ®ЎЃЎі ўБўАўР  ўВўОўДЎ®ўК ўГўД ўКўИўЕ 
ЎІўЕЎіўК ўЕЎІ Ў®ўКўЖ ЎђЎ±Ў≠ ўИўЗўЕўИўЕ 
ўГЎІўЖ ўБўКўЗ ўЗўЖЎІ ЎІўЖЎ≥ЎІўЖ ЎђўЕўКўД .. Ў®Ў≥Ў£ўД ЎєўДўКўЗ ўИўЕЎІЎ®ўДўВЎІўЗўИЎі
ўЕЎ≠Ў®ўИЎ≥ ўБўАўР Ў±ўИЎ≠ўГ .. ўИЎі Ў™ЎІўЖўК Ў®ўКЎѓЎІЎ±ўКўГ 
ўКЎІўЕЎІ ўВўИўДЎ™ ЎҐўЗ .. ўИўДЎІ ЎєўЕЎ± Ў≠Ўѓ Ў≠ўОЎ≥ Ў®ўКўГ 
ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ≥ Ў™ўВўИўД 
ЎІўЖўГ Ў™ЎєўКЎі ўБўАўР ЎІўДЎЇЎ±Ў®Ў© ЎЃўИўБ 
ЎЈЎ® Ў™ЎєўЕўД ЎІўКЎ© ўДўИ Ў™Ў®ўВўЙ ЎІўДЎЇЎ±Ў®Ў© ЎєЎІўКЎіЎ© ўБўКўГ

ўИЎ®ўВўИўД Ў®ЎЃўКЎ± ... ўИЎ®ЎЃЎ®ўК ЎІўДЎђЎѓ ўБўАўР ЎІўДўЗЎ≤ЎІЎ±

ЎЃўДўКўГ Ў≠Ўѓ ЎІўДўДўК ўКЎ≠Ў™Ў±ўЕўГ
ЎІЎ™Ў±ўГ ЎІўДўДўК ўКўВўДўД ўЕўЖўГ

ЎіўИ ўЕЎІ ЎµЎІЎ± ЎЈЎ±ўКўВўК 
Ў®ўГўЕўДўЗ ўГўБЎІЎ≠ўК Ў±ўБўКўВўК
ЎЃўДўК ЎІўДЎѓўЖўКЎІ Ў™ўЕЎіўК ўГўД ЎіўК 
Ў®ўИЎµўДўИ Ў®ўГўИўЖ Ў®Ў•ўКЎѓўК 

ўЕЎђЎ®ўИЎ± ЎІЎ™ЎІЎ®Ўє ЎђЎѓўКЎѓўК 
ЎђўЕўЗўИЎ±ўК ЎђўЕўЗўИЎ± Ў≠ЎѓўКЎѓўК 
ўДўИ Ў®ЎЃўДЎµ Ў®Ў™ўВўДўК ЎєўКЎѓўК
ўДўИ Ў®ЎЃўДЎµ Ў®Ў™ўВўДўК ЎєўКЎѓўК 


ЎЃўДўИўЖўК Ў®Ў≠ЎІўДўК ЎІўЖЎІ ўБЎ±ўКЎі
ўДўИ Ў™Ў≤ЎєўД ўЕЎєўДўКЎі ўДЎІ ўЕЎІ Ў™ўВўДўК ўДўКЎі
ўЕЎЂўДўК ЎІўЖЎІ ўЕЎІ ўБўКЎі 
Ў®ўГўКўБўК ЎІўЖЎІ Ў®ЎєўКЎі
Ў®Ў≥ ЎІўЖЎІ Ў®ЎІЎ±ЎѓЎ© ўИ Ў®Ў≠ўКЎІЎ™ўК ўБЎІўЗўЕЎ© 
ЎѓЎ±ўИЎ≥ ЎІўДЎѓўЖўКЎІ ЎѓЎІЎ±Ў≥Ў© 
ўЗЎѓўИ ЎєўДўКўК ЎіўИўК.

snippet.title: Glitterbomb Trap Catches Phone Scammer (who gets arrested)
snippet.description:
I glitterbombed my way up the scammer chain of command.  Come join me in my Creative Engineering class!! https://Monthly.com/MarkRober

If you suspect that you or a loved one has been the victim of fraud, you can call or visit the National Elder Fraud hotline (https://stopelderfraud.ovc.ojp.gov/)  at 833-372-8311 and report it to the FTC by visiting the agencyвАЩs website (https://reportfraud.ftc.gov/#/) or calling 877-382-4357.

Go watch JimвАЩs video to see how he located the scammers and subscribe to his channel- 
https://youtu.be/Xvjjpzyiig4

Go check out Perog's version here too- 
https://youtu.be/J4mkZU2Y0as

New music this time from the talented Laura Shigihara- https://open.spotify.com/track/1zOzvy6SeVJs2MEET7vyCW?si=f3fee98828fa4802

Lyrics -
Karda rahen ignore ve mainu
Labhgyi lagda hor ve tenu
Je tu pyar naal rakhna hi nahi 
Fer tu vapis tor ve mainu
Ik paasa karde yaar.. Asi tere nahi rehna
Marjaaneya tu hun nahi karda pyar..Asi tere nahi rehna

Tethon ramdev ton ve routine nahi chadya janda
Tu reliance chalauna hain..Tethon time nai kadhya janda
Tethon ramdev ton ve routine nahi chadya janda
Tu reliance chalauna hain..Tethon time nai kadhya janda

Kade bahr laja
Koi film dikha
Kade pyar naal
Koi gal sunaa
Banya rehnaa talwar asi tere nai rehna
Marjaneya
Tu hun nahi karda pyar asi tere nai rehna

Koi labh lyi hou chudail 
Chakkar koi paaya lagda
Sade pichon ve muuh
Kaala karvaaya lagda
Koi labh lyi hou chudail 
Chakkar koi paaya lagda
Sade pichon ve muuh
Kaala karvaaya lagda

Sanu milna nahi 
Milauna nahi
Babbu je pyar
Jatauna nahi
Ki pauna fer achaar Asi tere nahi rehna
Marhanevala
Tu hun nahi karda pyar asi tere nai rehna



#NehaKakkar #RubinaDilaik #AbhinavShukla

Ahmad Aburob : https://youtube.com/c/AhmadAburob

Ў®ўЕўЖЎІЎ≥Ў®Ў© ЎєўКЎѓ ЎІўДЎ£ўЕЎМ ЎєЎ®Ў±ўИЎІ ўИ Ў£ЎЄўЗЎ±ўИЎІ Ў≠Ў®ўГўЕ ўДЎ£ўЕўЗЎІЎ™ўГўЕ ЎєўДўЙ ЎІўД TikTokЎМ ЎІўДЎ±ЎІЎ®ЎЈ : 
https://www.tiktok.com/tag/dearmom

Ў™Ў≠Ў™ ўЗЎІЎіЎ™ЎІўВ : #Dearmom #TikTok
#Ў£ўЕўК_ЎІўДЎЇЎІўДўКЎ©  #Ў™ўКўГ_Ў™ўИўГ

ЎІЎ≠ЎґЎ±ўИЎІ ЎІўДўБўКЎѓўКўИ Ў®Ў™ўВўЖўКЎ© ЎІўД ( 1080p ) ЎєЎіЎІўЖ Ў™ЎіўИўБўИ ўГўДЎіўК Ў®ўИЎґўИЎ≠ 

~ ЎІЎ≥Ў¶ўДЎ© ўИ ЎІЎђўИЎ®Ў© Ў≥Ў±ўКЎєЎ© ~ 
ЎІўДЎІЎ≥ўЕ : Ў≥ЎІЎ±ЎІ 
ЎІўДЎєўЕЎ± : ў°ў¶ Ў≥ўЖЎ©
ЎІўДЎђўЖЎ≥ўКЎ© : Ў£Ў±ЎѓўЖўКЎ© ўИ Ў≥ЎІўГўЖЎ© Ў®ЎІўДЎІЎ±ЎѓўЖ 
ЎІўДўГЎІўЕўКЎ±ЎІ : canon 800D 
Ў®Ў±ўЖЎІўЕЎђ ЎІўДўЕўИўЖЎ™ЎІЎђ : final cut pro 


ЎІЎ≥ўЕЎІЎ¶ўК ЎєўДўЙ ўЕўИЎІўВЎє ЎІўДЎ™ўИЎІЎµўД ЎІўДЎІЎђЎ™ўЕЎІЎєўК : 
ЎІўЖЎ≥Ў™ЎђЎ±ЎІўЕ : lifeassara2004
ЎІўДЎ≥ўЖЎІЎ®   : lifeassara2004
* ўЕўЗўЕ Ў™Ў™ЎІЎ®ЎєўИўЖўК ЎєўДўЙ ЎІўДЎІўЖЎ≥Ў™ЎђЎ±ЎІўЕ Ў±Ў≠ ўКўГўИўЖ ўБўК ўГЎ™ўКЎ± ЎІЎіўКЎІЎ° ўЕЎєЎ™ўЕЎѓўЗ*


ЎІЎіЎ™Ў±ўГўИЎІ Ў®ЎІўДўВўЖЎІЎ© ўДўЖўИЎµўД ўД ў£ ўЕўДўКўИўЖ ЎМЎМ ЎІўЖЎіЎ±ўИЎІ ЎІўДўВўЖЎІЎ© Ў®ўГўД ўЕўГЎІўЖ рЯ•Ї.



(ўДЎІЎ™ўЖЎ≥ўИ Ў™Ў≠ЎЈўИ ўДЎІўКўГ Ў®ЎѓўЖЎІ ўЖўИЎµўД ЎІўДўБўКЎѓўКўИ ўІў† ЎІўДўБ ўДЎІўКўГ )

ЎІЎ≥Ў™ЎЇўБЎ±ЎІўДўДўЗ ЎІўДЎєЎЄўКўЕ ўИ ЎІЎ™ўИЎ® ЎІўДўКўЗвЬ® 
Ў≥Ў®Ў≠ЎІўЖ ЎІўДўДўЗ ўИ Ў®Ў≠ўЕЎѓўЗ Ў≥Ў®Ў≠ЎІўЖ ЎІўДўДўЗ ЎІўДЎєЎЄўКўЕ рЯТЂ

Ў®Ў≠Ў®ўГўЕ ўГЎ™ўКЎ± ЎМ ўИ Ў®ЎіўИўБўГўЕ Ў®ЎІўДўБўКЎѓўКўИ ЎІўДЎђЎІўК

Ў≠Ў≥ЎІЎ≥ ўИЎ±ўИЎ≠ўЗ Ў≠ўДўИЎ© Ў≤ўК ЎЇўЖўИЎ© Ў±ўВЎµЎ© ўЗўИЎ®ЎІ
ўЕЎі ўЕўЕўГўЖ Ў£ўЖЎ≥ўЙ ўГўД ўГўДўЕЎ© ўЗўЕЎ≥Ў© ўДўЕЎ≥ўЗ
ўВўДЎ®ўК ЎђўИЎ© ўИЎ®Ў≥ ўЗўИ ЎІўДўДўК Ў®Ў≠Ў®ўЗ ўИЎђўЖЎ®ўЗ Ў®Ў≠Ў≥ ўВўИЎ©
ЎђЎІўДўК Ў®ўЗЎѓЎІўИЎ© ЎѓЎІўИўЗ
ЎєўДўЕ ЎєўДЎІўЕЎ© ЎєўДЎІўЕЎ©
ўЕўКўЖ ЎѓўЗ ЎІўДўДўК Ў≥ЎІўИЎІ
ЎѓўЗ ўЕЎІЎ≥ ўИўЗўЕЎІ ўЖЎ≠ЎІЎ≥
Ў£ўЖЎІ ЎіўИўБЎ™ ўГЎ™ўКЎ± ўИўВўДўКўД ўИўЕЎІЎіўИўБЎ™Ўі Ў≠Ўѓ ЎђўЕўКўД ўИЎ™ўВўКўД ўГЎѓўЗ
Ў£Ў≥Ў™ЎІЎ∞ ўБўЖЎІўЖ ЎѓўГЎ™ўИЎ± ўЕЎѓЎ±Ў≥Ў© ўБўЖ ўИўЗўЖЎѓЎ≥Ў© ЎІўКўЗ ЎѓўЗ ўГўД ЎѓўЗ
ЎІЎѓЎ±ЎђўК Ў≠ўДўЖЎђўК ўИўЕЎ≤ЎђўЖЎђўК Ў®Ў≥ ЎђЎѓ ўИўЕЎі ўГўДЎІўЕўЖЎђўК
ўБЎ™ўЖўК ўЗўИЎ≥ўЖўК Ў™ЎєЎ®ўЖўК ўЕЎІ Ў±ўКЎ≠ўЖўК ўИЎІЎіўИЎІўВўК ЎІЎ™ўЕЎ±ЎђЎ≠Ў™ ЎІўИўК
ўИЎІЎіўИЎІўВўК ЎІЎ™ўЕЎ±ЎђЎ≠Ў™ ЎІўИўК
Ў£ЎµўД ЎІўДЎІўБўЖЎѓўК ЎѓўЗ ўБўК Ў≠Ў™ўЗ Ў™ЎІўЖўКўЗ ЎєўЖЎѓўК
ўЕЎ™Ў±Ў≥Ў™Ў£ ЎђўИЎ© ўВўДЎ®ўК ўИўБўК ўВўДЎ®ўК ўДўЗ ЎЇўДЎІўИЎ©
Ў£ЎµўД ЎІўДЎІўБўЖЎѓўК ЎѓўЗ ўБўК Ў≠Ў™ўЗ Ў™ЎІўЖўКўЗ ЎєўЖЎѓўК
ўЕЎ™Ў±Ў≥Ў™Ў£ ЎђўИЎ© ўВўДЎ®ўК ўИўБўК ўВўДЎ®ўК ўДўЗ ЎЇўДЎІўИЎ©

Ў±ўИЎ≠ўК Ў±ЎІЎ≠Ў™ ўЕўЖўК ўЖўЖ ЎєўКўЖўЗ ЎЃЎѓўЖўК ЎЇЎµЎ® ЎєўЖўК ўЗўИЎ®ЎІ

ЎІЎ±Ў™Ў®ўГ ўИЎ™ўДЎІЎ≠ЎЄ ЎІўДЎєЎІўДўЕ ЎєўДўК !
ЎІўЖЎІ ўДўГ ўКЎІЎ±ўИЎ≠ Ў±ўИЎ≠ўК ўИЎІўЖЎ™ ўДўК
ўИЎі ЎєўДўК ўЕўЖ ЎІўДЎ®ЎіЎ± ўДЎІЎІЎЇўДўКЎ™ўЖўК

ЎІЎ≠Ў®ўГ ўИўДЎІ ўБўГЎ±Ў™ ЎІЎЃўИўЖўГ
ўДўИ Ў™ЎЃўИўЖўГ ЎІўДЎѓўЖўКЎІ ўИЎІўЗўДўЗЎІ

Ў™ЎґўКЎєўЖўК Ў®ЎґЎ≠ўГЎ© ЎєўКўИўЖўГ
ўИЎІЎ™ўИўЗ Ў®Ў±ЎґЎІўЗЎІ ўИЎ®Ў≤ЎєўДўЗЎІ

ЎІўЖЎІ ўГЎЂЎ± ўЕЎІўЗўЕЎ™ ўБўКўГ
Ў£ЎЇЎІЎ± ўЕўЖ ЎґўДўГ ЎєўДўКўГ
ўДўИ ЎІўДўДўК ЎІЎіЎєЎ± Ў®ўЗ ўКЎђўКўГ
ўЕЎІўВўДЎ™ ўДўК ЎЇўДЎЈЎІўЖ


ЎІўДЎ≠ўКЎІЎ© Ў®ўВЎ±Ў®ўГ ЎІўЖ ЎіЎІўЖЎ™ Ў™Ў≤ўКўЖ
ўДЎІЎ™ўИЎІЎѓЎєўЖўК ўИЎІўЖЎІ ўВўДЎ®ўК Ў≠Ў≤ўКўЖ
ЎІўДўЕўИЎІЎѓЎє Ў≠Ў±ўВ ЎђўИўБ ўИЎѓўЕЎє ЎєўКўЖ
ўИЎі ЎІЎ®ўК ўБўК ЎІўДЎєўЕЎ± ўДЎІўИЎѓЎєЎ™ўЖўК

ўДЎІЎ™ЎєўКЎіўЖўК ЎіЎєўИЎ± ЎІўДЎІЎЇЎ™Ў±ЎІЎ®
ўГўД ЎіўК ЎІўДЎІ ЎІўДЎ™ЎЇўДўК ўИЎІўДЎЇўКЎІЎ® 
ўДЎІЎ™ЎЃўИўЖ ЎІўДўИЎєЎѓ ўКўИўЕ ЎІўИЎєЎѓЎ™ўЖўК

ЎђЎєўД ўКЎЃЎЈўКўГ ЎІўДўЕўВЎѓЎ± ўИЎІўДўЖЎµўКЎ®
ўДЎІўЖўИўЙ ўКЎІЎЃЎ∞ўГ ўЕўЖўК ўКЎІўДЎ≠Ў®ўКЎ®
ўЕЎІўЖўК ўЕЎ™ЎµўИЎ±ўГ ЎєўЖ ЎєўКўЖўК Ў™ЎЇўКЎ®
ўГўКўБ ЎІўЗЎѓўГ Ў®ЎєЎѓ ўЕЎІЎєўДўВЎ™ўЖўК !

ўДЎІЎ™ўВЎ≥ўЙ ЎєўДўЙ ўВўДЎ®ўК Ў™Ў±ЎІўЖўК

snippet.title: Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)
snippet.description:
Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. @DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgiaвАЛвАЛ

Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances. 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC-J-вАЛвАЛ...

See more official videos from Dua Lipa here:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?listвАЛвАЛ...

Listen to more from the album 'Future Nostalgia' :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?listвАЛвАЛ...

Follow Dua Lipa:
Instagram:  https://dualipa.co/instagramвАЛвАЛ
Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebookвАЛвАЛ
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficialвАЛвАЛ
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitterвАЛвАЛ
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtubeвАЛвАЛ

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipaвАЛ #FutureNostalgiaвАЛ #Grammys
